LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HOWARD JEW'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED; THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE CONCERNING SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MORE CREDIBLE THAN DEFENDANT'S BOLD DENIAL. HAVING DEFAULTED, DEFENDANT WAS NOT ENTITLED TO NOTICE OF THE CORRECTION OF THE DISMISSAL INTENDED ONLY TO DISMISS HIS CO-DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM E. WEISS, TEL. NO. 362-6765 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAMES PETER MOLINELLI, APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HOWARD JEW'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER SETTING ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED; THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE CONCERNING SERVICE ON DEFENDANT MORE CREDIBLE THAN DEFENDANT'S BOLD DENIAL. HAVING DEFAULTED, DEFENDANT WAS NOT ENTITLED TO NOTICE OF THE CORRECTION OF THE DISMISSAL INTENDED ONLY TO DISMISS HIS CO-DEFENDANT. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
